description:
Auto-switch your Windows PC to the TV when a gamepad is connected.

ShiftPad is a small Windows utility for people who use one PC with both a desk monitor and a TV.

Plug a gamepad in and the picture jumps to the TV, audio follows, and Steam Big Picture (or any custom launcher) opens automatically. Unplug — display, audio and launcher all return to the desktop setup.

Features:
- Automatic display switching (target-only, extend, or clone) on gamepad connect
- Automatic audio device switching, with HDMI auto-detect after the display change
- Optional Steam Big Picture or custom launcher startup
- Optional HDMI-CEC support via Pulse-Eight USB-CEC adapter
- Configurable activation combo (sequence of buttons) to prevent false triggers
- Boot-time recovery if a gaming session ended uncleanly
- 30-day free trial, then a one-time lifetime license at https://shiftpad.ru/pro
Initial public release.
- Auto-switch display to TV when a gamepad is connected
- Audio follows to HDMI / configurable target device
- Optional launch of Steam Big Picture (or any custom launcher)
- HDMI-CEC support via Pulse-Eight USB-CEC adapter
- Configurable activation combo to prevent false triggers
- 30-day free trial, lifetime license at https://shiftpad.ru/pro
